# Bug Sweep Report Archive

**Archived**: 2026-05-26  
**Reason**: Phases 0–3 are complete. Daily bug sweep reports from 2026-05-03 through 2026-05-22 have been moved here for historical reference.

Active reports (2026-05-23 onwards) remain in `.github/docs/`.

## Coverage

| Date range | Phase | Count |
|---|---|---|
| 2026-05-03 – 2026-05-15 | Phase 0 (Stabilisation) | 32 |
| 2026-05-16 – 2026-05-20 | Phase 1 (MT5 Bridge) | 14 |
| 2026-05-21 – 2026-05-22 | Phase 2 (Trade Telemetry) + Phase 3 start | 6 |
| **Total** | | **64** |
